summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solar Plant Management System with new UC features. All backend APIs (11/11 tests) and frontend UI elements working correctly. Login, Consumer Units page with badges, dropdown menu, upload modal, and new UC creation all functional.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint - 200 OK
Backend: Login with valid credentials (projetos.onsolucoes@gmail.com) - 200 OK
Backend: Login with invalid credentials - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: List Consumer Units API - 200 OK with migration support
Backend: List Plants API - 200 OK
Backend: Create UC with new fields (uc_number, tariff_group, compensation_percentage) - 200 OK
Backend: List Invoices API - 200 OK
Backend: PDF Upload Grupo A - Successfully parsed
Backend: PDF Upload Grupo B - Successfully parsed
Backend: Dashboard Stats - 200 OK
Backend: Plants Summary - 200 OK
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Login with credentials works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with charts and stats
Frontend: Consumer Units page loads and lists UCs
Frontend: UC badges (Geradora/Beneficiária) display correctly
Frontend: UC badges (Grupo A/Grupo B) display correctly
Frontend: Compensation percentage (50% de compensação) displays on beneficiária UCs
Frontend: UC dropdown menu works with all 4 options (Upload Fatura, Ver Faturas, Editar, Excluir)
Frontend: Upload PDF modal opens correctly from dropdown
Frontend: Nova UC button opens creation modal with all new fields
Frontend: UC creation modal shows uc_number, tariff_group, compensation_percentage, is_generator fields
critical_code_review_comments: ConsumerUnits.jsx has useEffect dependency warning - missing 'loadData' in dependency array (Line 87)
Dashboard table structure has hydration warning - span cannot be child of tbody
seed_data_creation: Test UC created and deleted during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UC features (uc_number, tariff_group, compensation_percentage, is_generator) working. PDF upload parsing for both Grupo A and B invoices functional. Backend automatically migrates old UCs without uc_number field. Test PDFs available at /tmp/fatura_grupo_a.pdf and /tmp/fatura_grupo_b.pdf.
